ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in months */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of instruction */,
  "tuition_fees" TEXT /* Tuition fees for the program */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discount applicable to the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the program */,
  "program_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of the discount (e.g., early bird, scholarship) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, alumni) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the payment is for */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., tuition, fees) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES program_enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the aid */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the financial aid */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial aid */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial aid */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial aid (e.g., scholarship, grant) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial aid was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of enrollments in the program */,
  "completion_rate" TEXT /* Completion rate of the program */,
  "average_salary" TEXT /* Average salary of graduates from the program */,
  "job_placement_rate" TEXT /* Job placement rate of graduates from the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_performance_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or position of the faculty member */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the faculty member */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the course is offered in */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "course_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "attendance_record" TEXT /* Attendance record of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the resource is associated with */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., textbook, software) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the resource */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "resource_url" TEXT /* URL of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_resources_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
